title: Chat problem demo
voiceover: A shared list in a chat looks simple at first. But after a few messages, it is already hard to find.
ClipScript turns a short JSON script into a vertical promo video.

messages: Milk, bread, eggs, cheese, bananas, greens, pasta and coffee
